title: commiphora angustata
intro: Commiphora angustata, also known as the 'Kanya', is a species of tree in the Burseraceae family, native to East Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Commiphora angustata include reducing fever, treating wounds, and aiding in digestion, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-parasitic agent. Traditionally, Commiphora angustata is used to prepare a variety of herbal remedies, including essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
